Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /fcmetrics to open the window.
Changelog:
Main panel update:
- Added a rotating FC information panel beneath the FC target graph.
- Total FC Credits, weekly progress, and personal estimate now fade in and out in one shared space.
- Moved the shared week base beneath the rotating information panel.
